blocks.content: Two weeks felt like a long time on the last night of Episode 1. It wasn't.
Tryouts were Thursday. It was Monday.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: You didn't say you were either. That's the same thing.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: You been thinking about it since the first day. Thinking time is over homie. Thursday.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: What if I'm not good enough?

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Then you find out Thursday. But you don't find out standing here.
He wasn't wrong. He's almost never wrong about things like this, which is the annoying part.

blocks.prompt: Jonathan's waiting. Thursday is in three days.
